没刀，搞笑，有女主（红缨，倪克斯，纪念....等），热血。

穿越到斩神世界，成了荒天帝的人间代理人。

身体中流淌着天帝血脉。

开局觉醒鲲鹏法，万物皆可吞，邪祟就是养料，吞噬神秘生物就是开启荒天帝技能的唯一办法。

不管是什么境界的神秘生物，就算是神明，都可以吃。

横推同代无敌手，三大至尊术，六大自创术法，五大顶级功法，十八种至高宝术，即便是荒他哥也只能叫他弟弟，而不能叫板其战力。

"赵问天，加入古神教会，姑娘们随你玩。"

"滚，什么垃圾？黑夜女神我都睡过，要你这货色？？你们看看我手中的大罗剑胎，我要杀穿整个世界。"

"我要大夏境内，只有大夏神明！"

吞噬星空，依靠金手指横推之后，靠自己肉身成神。

在斩神世界独断万古。

中期开始，没跟原著，而是横推神国为主

他化厄瑞波斯，他是倪克斯命定的丈夫，是红缨的真命天子，是纪念的青梅竹马，是蔷薇求而不得的男人，是夏思萌的阴差阳错......

吾以吾身化清风，清风送吾入昆仑。
昆仑龙脉，起！

本侯血战漠北，封狼居胥，今日身化祁连，祁连龙脉登天。

九条龙脉，七个守夜人总司令，第五宇宙升维！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/634757213c3830d562276ccf553b6455","author":"五月初五发发发","author_id":"","book_id":"7403160676706831385","book_name":"斩神，荒天帝代理人，真的不开车","book_short_name":"荒天帝一滴血","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":857,"name":"斩神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=857&name=斩神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7416340819830915646","read_count":"45993","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1321983"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"598","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,开局,同人,搞笑轻松,斩神,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/99d5e724bcb698f6eef86fb613ef328a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779439075&x-signature=JeVgZHhpIRsNPSsFB%2BtQ2%2BNo%2FYQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"94325008059","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"55"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231637559525FD5198A1BFFBD50C"}"},"rela
